name: Downer Edi Limited
analysis: DOW has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$8.0355. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$8.0524 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$8.0355, stop A$7.6032, target A$8.0900. Risk/reward is 0.13:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
